lessons.title: 1.3. Functions of literature (This must come from the syllabus with its serial number)
topics: SUB-TOPIC: 1.3.1. Oral literature (This must come from the syllabus with its serial number)
activities: RATIONALE: This lesson is on Functions of Literature – specifically Oral literature. It is
particularly focused on the use of oral literature (FOLKTALES) in managing cross cutting issues.
Through library/ internet research, brainstorming, analysis and collaboration, learners will acquire
a skill of deducing hidden wisdom from orature like folktales to explain social phenomena. This is

lessons.title: of 3 on the topic and sub-topic.
topics:  2024 Literature in Zambian Language Secondary Education Ordinary Level Syllabus-Form 1-4

resources:  Collection of folktales, proverbs, poems, songs etc.
